_comment: Committed, auditable pins for the AgenTel one-command bootstrap (scripts/agentel.mjs). Each entry pins an OFFICIAL Node.js distribution archive by its published SHA-256 (verified against https://nodejs.org/dist/<version>/SHASUMS256.txt). The bootstrap NEVER executes an archive whose bytes do not match one of these pins. Bumping a pin is a deliberate, reviewed act: fetch the official SHASUMS256.txt for the new version and paste the exact hash.
